description: scootmart-marketplace-class regression-guard. Stripe Checkout session is created with unit_amount sourced from the request body (priceAed taken from req.json()). Attacker POSTs {priceAed: 1} to pay a single cent for an arbitrarily expensive listing. Server must source amount from a DB lookup keyed by a validated product/listing ID — never from client input. After F-PRICE-TAMPER-1 the new payment-flow-checker scanner must fire CRITICAL.
